summary: First-finish smoke test of LazR Hub. Backend: all critical endpoints healthy (root, categories x11, assets w/ creator enrichment, search, leaderboards, collections, auth login/register/me/logout, asset CRUD, favorite, download, comments, upload multipart, users/{username}, follow, dashboard stats). Frontend: Home loads with hero + search + 11 categories + 16 asset cards; category click filters explore correctly (3 wallpapers); admin login (admin@lazrhub.com/admin123) redirects to /dashboard with stats + tabs; asset detail loads with download button; leaderboards has 4 tabs; collections shows New button when authed; creator profile shows follow button. Core flows functional.
passed: GET /api/assets returns 12 assets with enriched creator (name, username, avatar)
GET /api/assets?q=wallpaper returns 2 filtered results; sort=likes works
POST /api/auth/register creates user and returns cookie
POST /api/assets (authed) creates asset owned by user (uses asset_id key)
POST /api/assets/{id}/comments with {text} works; GET returns list
GET /api/users/luma returns creator with stats (total_downloads, uploads, etc.)
GET /api/collections returns list; GET /api/leaderboards/{creators,assets} return sorted lists
Frontend Home: hero, search-input, 11 categories, 16 asset cards render
Frontend Login: admin credentials redirect to /dashboard; stats + My Uploads visible
Frontend Asset Detail: opens on asset-card click; asset-download-button present
Frontend Collections: collections-new button visible when authed

failed.issue: Task spec listed testids as 'category-glow-forge-1' and 'favorite-btn' on asset detail. Actual code uses 'category-{slug}' (e.g. category-wallpapers) and asset detail uses 'asset-favorite' (not 'favorite-btn' — that id is only on AssetCard). Not a functional bug; just spec inconsistency.
failed.evidence: grep in CategoryCard.jsx: data-testid={`category-${cat.slug}`}; AssetDetail.jsx: data-testid="asset-favorite"

action_items: Optional: reconcile data-testid naming in the review spec with actual code (category-{slug}, asset-favorite) so future automated tests target the correct selectors.
Comment POST body field is 'text' on backend (frontend already sends 'text') — spec mentioned 'content' which would 422. Consider aligning docs.
Not tested (deferred to full QA): Upload page drag-drop flow end-to-end, Settings profile update, /register full UI flow, Trending marquee visual, sort=trending correctness beyond 200.
